title: Disticholiparis arcuata
taxonomy: Disticholiparis arcuata is a species of plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid, which is one of the most diverse and widespread groups of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Disticholiparis arcuata is classified as part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, with Disticholiparis arcuata belonging to the tribe Gastrodieae. The specific classification of Disticholiparis arcuata within the larger taxonomy is still being researched and refined.
